_notes: Canonical MCP server config for stromy-plugin. Edit only this file. Run scripts/render-mcp.py to regenerate .mcp.json / .gemini/settings.json / .codex/config.toml / .vscode/mcp.json.

deliverable-canvas._notes: Shared canvas backend for strategic deliverables (proposal, messaging-framework, press-release). Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID (handled by mcp-remote browser flow). See infra-docs/ai/deliverable-canvas.md.

nl-gov-data._notes: Dutch government open-data MCP — search/fetch legislation, parliamentary records, Rijksoverheid documents, plus the intel/analysis skills (nl-gov-data, nl-tensions, nl-policy-legislative-landscape, nl-parliamentary-positioning, nl-issue-framing, nl-gov-shared). Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID. Composes with stromy-format for rendering — see infra-docs/ai/three-layer-tooling.md.

stromy-format._notes: Hosted format skills (format-pptx, format-pptx-hd, format-docx, format-pdf, format-pdf-hd, format-xlsx, format-mermaid, format-diagram, format-chart, format-remotion-video). Fetched at runtime via fs_read — see skills/<name>/SKILL.md stubs.

asset-broker._notes: Authenticated client-asset broker — propose reviewed website/brand edits as GitHub PRs (asset-editor skill, fetched via fs_read). Per-user OAuth via Microsoft Entra ID. Stromy self-client only until per-caller repo scoping (ORG-072) lands — the App installation is scoped to Stromy's repos.

ms365._notes: Tool-limited Microsoft 365 broker for deliverable delivery only: create an upload session, resolve the caller's OneDrive / SharePoint destination, and hand the credential-free uploadUrl to stromy-format's deliver_to push contract. Exported plugins keep the env vars portable per machine; do not hardcode William's local cache paths here.
